documentation.description:
Static data to configure the ADS-B transponder (send within 10 sec of a
POR and every 10 sec thereafter)

record_types.name: Uavionix_Adsb_Out_Cfg

fields.name: Callsign
fields.description:
Vehicle identifier (8 characters, null terminated, valid characters
are A-Z, 0-9, " " only)

fields.name: Emittertype
fields.description: Transmitting vehicle type. See ADSB_EMITTER_TYPE enum

fields.name: Aircraftsize
fields.description: Aircraft length and width encoding (table 2-35 of DO-282B)

fields.name: Gpsoffsetlat
fields.description: GPS antenna lateral offset (table 2-36 of DO-282B)

fields.name: Gpsoffsetlon
fields.description:
GPS antenna longitudinal offset from nose [if non-zero, take
position (in meters) divide by 2 and add one] (table 2-37 DO-282B)

fields.name: Stallspeed
fields.description:
Units: [cm/s]
Aircraft stall speed in cm/s

fields.name: Rfselect
fields.description: ADS-B transponder receiver and transmit enable flags
